## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Milestone Check

- [ ] Linked issue has a milestone (`Backlog` is acceptable when no thematic milestone fits).

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `python .github/scripts/validate_contribution_guardrails.py --pr-number <id> --repo pcoletsos/squirreldisk --token <token>` (if token available)

Document any fork/upstream compatibility considerations.
